message:
chore(e2e): fix shell variable quoting in artifact path substitution

Quote $ROOT_DIR in parameter expansions (${var#"$ROOT_DIR"/}) to handle
paths with spaces robustly. Remove unused RCH_PROBE_LOG variable.

Fixes ~40 log_json invocations across five replay scenario test scripts:
artifact_write_read, capture_extraction, capture_pipeline,
decision_capture, redaction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
